channel.title: RVA Figure Drawing
channel.description: Figure drawing sessions in Richmond, VA

item.title: Thu, May 28 · 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing - 5/28
item.description: Location: Studio Two Three, 109 W 15th St Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $20.00 | 3-hour figure drawing workshop with professional nude model. Instructor Carter Helmandollar calls poses, starting with short gestural poses and building to longer poses. Artists bring own materials; extra paper, pencils, and clipboards available.

item.title: Thu, May 28 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing studio, last Thursday of each month, 18+, no registration required

item.title: Sun, Jun 7 · 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM — Figure Drawing Open Session - June 7, 2026
item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.title: Tue, Jun 9 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Evening Figure Drawing
item.description: Location: Artspace, 2833-A Hathaway Rd, Richmond, VA | Cost: $10 donation | Figure Drawing sessions every second Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2.5 hours. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18. Limited space – arrive promptly.

item.title: Fri, Jun 12 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing (F-A)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Sun, Jun 14 · 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM — Figure Drawing (S-A)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Sun, Jun 14 · 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM — Figure Drawing Open Session - June 14, 2026
item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.title: Tue, Jun 16 · 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM — Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace
item.description: Location: Artspace, 2833-A Hathaway Rd, Richmond, VA | Cost: $10 donation | Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. Chairs provided, bring your own drawing materials. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18. Limited space – arrive promptly.

item.title: Wed, Jun 24 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — 18+ Figure Drawing: June Session
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10.00 | Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to artists 18+. Short pose session featuring a single model. Tickets must be purchased in advance; space is limited. Valid photo ID required at door.

item.title: Thu, Jun 25 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing studio, last Thursday of each month, 18+, no registration required

item.title: Fri, Jun 26 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing (F-B)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Sun, Jun 28 · 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM — Figure Drawing (S-B)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Fri, Jul 3 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing (F-C)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Fri, Jul 17 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing (F-E)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Sun, Jul 19 · 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM — Figure Drawing Open Session - July 19, 2026
item.description: Location: Art Works Inc, 320 Hull Street, Richmond, VA 23224 | Cost: $12.51 | Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

item.title: Fri, Jul 24 · 6:30 PM – 9:00 PM — Figure Drawing (F-F)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Sun, Jul 26 · 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM — Figure Drawing (S-D)
item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.

item.title: Wed, Jul 29 · 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM — Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
item.description: Location: Unkindness Art, 2923 North Avenue, Richmond, VA 23222 | Cost: $10.00 | Instructed life drawing crash course covering techniques for drawing from life and the human figure. Includes a presentation followed by a guided session with a live clothed model. All-ages event hosted by resident tattoo artist Liam Williams.

item.title: Thu, Jul 30 · 6:00 PM – 8:30 PM — Figure Drawing Open Studio
item.description: Location: Hanover Arts | Cost: $10 | Open figure drawing studio, last Thursday of each month, 18+, no registration required

item.description: Location: Visual Arts Center of Richmond, 1812 W Main St, Richmond, VA 23220 | Cost: $7 | Open figure drawing session. $3 tuition + ~$4 model fee.
